source: Creator Monetize — Call Funnel VSL, Value Video VSL, AI VSL Writing

call_funnel_vsl.name: Call Funnel VSL Structure
call_funnel_vsl.purpose: Get someone to book a call. NOT selling the program — selling the call.

1_hook.rule: Refer back to hook element later in video

2_understand_problem.purpose: Show you are in their head
elements: Future pace: what happens if nothing changes

structure: What made you want to change

5_unique_problem.method: List what they tried → reveal wrong problem → introduce the REAL root problem
examples: You don't have a weight problem. You have a nervous system problem.
It's not your dating skills — it's your 'Repeller Effect'
5_unique_problem.rule: Make the new problem simple, visual, nameable

6_unique_solution.method: Explain simply → Name the method → Walk through steps briefly → Layer casual proof
6_unique_solution.rule: They believe the solution makes sense, sounds doable, has worked for others

must_cover: Crossroads Close: Path 1 (close tab) vs Path 2 (book call)
Crystal clear command: click button, pick time, fill form

mistakes_to_avoid: Story too long with random details
Teaching too much (they leave feeling they have the answer)
Waiting too long to hint at solution
Only saying CTA once or being unclear

value_video_vsl.name: Value Video VSL Structure
value_video_vsl.purpose: Sell the program directly (straight sale) or get them to book a call

1_promise.purpose: Sell them on watching THE VIDEO

2_proof.rule: Avoid 'my student' — say 'Like NAME, a AGE from COUNTRY who went from X to X'

3_expand.purpose: Get them to buy into watching entire video
3_expand.tip: For 10+ min videos: offer something free (PDF, checklist) if they stay until end

structure.beginning: Relate to their pains (increases prospect pain)

6_transition.template: Look, if right now, you know {NEGATIVE_1}, {NEGATIVE_2}, {NEGATIVE_3} don't worry. You DON'T have to be born with {POSITIVE_QUALITIES}. Right now you KNOW the 3 things standing between you and {DREAM_OUTCOME} are: 1. {STEP_1} 2. {STEP_2} 3. {STEP_3}

7_product_intro.per_module: What it is → features → benefit → benefit of benefit → case study proof
7_product_intro.video_testimonials: Max 10 seconds each, max 3 at a time

method: 3 'How much would it be worth' questions
'Just think about that for a second...'
price_anchor.skip_if: Book-A-Call funnel — do NOT state price

structure: Explain they are at a crossroads
Reality 2: path taken by many (dream outcome)

rcibo_ai_system.name: RCIBO Prompting Framework for VSL Writing

components.R_role: Tell Claude who it is (world-class copywriter who writes high-converting VSLs)

ideal_client: Who this is for (specific: age, background)
brand_pov: What you believe people get wrong

components.B_brand_voice: Feed Claude existing copy or winning examples to reverse-engineer
components.O_outline: Full VSL structure as outlined above

workflow: Ask for Variations (3-5 per key section)
Final Polish (cut, tighten, rephrase, add emotion)
rookie_mistakes: Being too controlling or too vague
